creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Alexandre,

Sorry for the delay. I created a review for this PR at: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D15023

I proposed some changes to the port:

    Update to 2.12.8
    USE_GITHUB since this release is only in GH and not in SF
    Add LICENSE according to project's site (no license file is provided)
    Flavorize port and make qt5 default (as in the old version)

Do you have a Phabricator account? If so, you can join the review.
